svg.title: Context engineering full stack
svg.desc: Four-layer diagram: framework strip at top, context window anatomy in the middle with inputs on the left and outputs on the right, then context management and DSPy optimization at the bottom

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does DSPy replace manual prompt writing with automatic optimization from examples?')
sendPrompt('Show me a complete Pydantic AI agent for the robotics learning platform with RunContext and typed deps')
sendPrompt('What exactly does Instructor do under the hood and how does it retry with validation errors?')
sendPrompt('How does LiteLLM route between Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini, and Ollama with one unified interface?')
sendPrompt('Show me how to build a system prompt with dynamic injection points for skills and memory in Python')
sendPrompt('What is a skill in prompt engineering and how does the skill registry pattern work in code?')
sendPrompt('Show me the full memory retrieval and injection pipeline from Qdrant into the context in Python')
sendPrompt('How do I design tool schemas so the model reliably selects and calls them with correct arguments?')
sendPrompt('Show me the sliding window history manager with summarization compression in Python code')
sendPrompt('What preprocessing should I apply to a user message before injecting it into the context?')
sendPrompt('Show me a Pydantic AI agent with RunContext, typed dependencies, and tool registration for a learning platform')
sendPrompt('How does Instructor parse the model output into a Pydantic model and feed validation errors back for retry?')
sendPrompt('How does the tool executor handle parallel tool calls and return results back into the context?')
sendPrompt('When and how do I update the memory store after a conversation turn using mem0?')
sendPrompt('How do I build an LLM-as-judge eval pipeline with a rubric for the hint generator?')
sendPrompt('Show me how to count tokens accurately with tiktoken and enforce a hard budget in the context builder')
sendPrompt('Show me the sliding window with 15 percent overlap implemented in Python without any framework')
sendPrompt('How does LLM-based summarization compression work for conversation history and when does it trigger?')
sendPrompt('What is the lost-in-the-middle problem and how do I reorder chunks to put the most important content at the boundaries?')

svg.text: Models attend strongest to context start + end

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Show me a complete DSPy Signature and ChainOfThought module for the Socratic hint generator')
sendPrompt('How does MIPROv2 work in DSPy and what does it actually do to my prompts during optimization?')
sendPrompt('What does a DSPy metric function look like for hint quality evaluation and how is it used in optimization?')
sendPrompt('How do I save and load a compiled DSPy program and what is actually stored in it?')
